summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: hexagonal grid (REQ-13), Iron Command visual overhaul (REQ-14), new Tailwind/CSS tokens (REQ-15), and some parts of REQ-16. However, the generated image assets for REQ-16 are not present in the diff, and GridTile.tsx is not updated. The panel frame image application to EgyptianPanel is also not confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: A new dark battle board background image (battle-board-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png) must be saved in frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: No file addition under frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-board-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png is present in the diff. Only 1 file was added (hexGrid.ts).

missing_requirements.requirement: A new dark command panel border/frame image (command-panel-frame-dark.dim_960x640.png) must be saved in frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: No file addition for command-panel-frame-dark.dim_960x640.png is present in the diff. The diff shows only 1 added file (hexGrid.ts).

missing_requirements.requirement: The new panel frame image must be applied to EgyptianPanel and all major game panels.
missing_requirements.reason: There is no EgyptianPanel component modified in the diff, and no reference to the command-panel-frame-dark image being applied anywhere in the changed files.

missing_requirements.requirement: GridTile.tsx must be updated to use hexagonal cell rendering.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff does not include GridTile.tsx as a modified or added file. Only BattleBoard.tsx is modified for hex grid rendering.

hallucinated_features.description: Scanline texture overlay on the MainMenu using repeating-linear-gradient
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a scanline texture overlay effect on the main menu. This is an additional visual feature not described in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Hieroglyph Unicode character row as a decorative element on the MainMenu
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement specifies adding a row of Unicode hieroglyph characters as a decorative element on the main menu.
